title: Oakspire Resources
description: This resource adds localized translations for several elements of the game and corrects some errors
body:
🌿 OakSpire Resources is a complementary texture package designed to improve the Vanilla de Minecraft experience. This resource focuses on correcting some errors, improving translations and polishing details that usually go unnoticed, all without altering the original game aesthetics.

🔍 Main characteristics:

Translations located for several languages to spanish
Compatible with modpacks such as Oakspire and Vanilla versions
Some mods compatibility:
- Additional Rpg Jewelry
- Alluremet
- Archers
- Archers Expansion
